administrationPage.heading: User management
administrationPage.subheading: All registered accounts and their application role.

errors.unreachable: The users service is unreachable right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.malformed_payload: Unexpected response from the users service. Contact an administrator if the issue persists.

userManagementTable.caption: List of application users
userManagementTable.resendTooltip: Send a new activation email with a fresh link (previous link expired or invalid).
userManagementTable.resendFailed: Could not resend the activation email.
userManagementTable.resendConfirm: A new activation email with a fresh link will be sent to “{{username}}”. The previous link will stop working. The user still cannot sign in until they set their password.
userManagementTable.renewTooltip: Send a password reset email: the current password will be cleared and the user must set a new one.
userManagementTable.renewFailed: Could not send the renewal email.
userManagementTable.renewConfirm: The current password for “{{username}}” will be cleared and a reset email will be sent. The user cannot sign in until they set a new password.
userManagementTable.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete account “{{username}}” and all related data (reports, teams, sessions)? This cannot be undone.
